titleStmt.title: SII 5.1225: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1225. (A.R. No. 343 of 1896). ON THE THIRTY-NINTH PILLAR IN THE SAME MANDAPA, WEST FACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . sakhavaruśaṁbbulu 1271 kaṁḍḍagu nēṁṭṭi śrīvīrā
divīranaranārasiṁhyadēva prava¨rddhamāna vijayarājyasaṁvatsa
28 śrāI mīna śukla 11 saurivāramunā śrīkū¨rmmanāthadēvaraku
gaṁggādēvimahādēviṁgāru nibaṁddhadattamu Ubhayadhūpālaṁdu
Ālavaṭṭamu Oka 1 naṭṭava tallu kolapaṁgaladu śītādēviṁ da
ttamu cāmaralure 2 ku kunapanāĪni ku(ṁ)nturu śūrāśāni . śiṁggārini
ku(ṁ)nturu bāśāsāni . vīrumuvvurunnu Ubhayadūpālaṁddunu śrī
kū¨rmmanāthani kolvaṁgalāru naṭṭavatalāśānki nityapraśādamu ku
ḍutu 1 Āppamu 1 viḍiyamu 1 śurāśānki nityapraśādamu
kuḍutumu 1 Āpphamu 1 viḍiyamu 1 bāśāsānki nitya
prasādamu kuḍutu 1 Apphamu viḍiyamu 1 gā nityamu
prasādamutu 3 Apphalumu 3 viḍiyālu 3 Iṁdulaku śrībha
ṁḍḍāramaṁddu peṭṭina paiḍḍimallamāḍalu mu 30 I datta
mu tirupati śrīvaṣṇamarakṣa śrī śrī śrī . naṭṭavataluku jīta
mu gaṁḍamaḍa 1 kunapanāĪni kūṁtuṟu sūrasāniki
jītamu gaṁḍamā O 1 siṁgārini kuṁtuṟu bāsasā
niki jītamu gaṁḍamāḍa O 1 .
Digital edition of SII 5.1225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
